animeList.title: Attack on Titan
animeList.description: Humanity fights for survival against man-eating giants.

animeList.title: Demon Slayer
animeList.description: A boy becomes a demon slayer to save his sister.

animeList.title: One Punch Man
animeList.description: A hero who can defeat any enemy with one punch.

animeList.title: My Hero Academia
animeList.description: Boy born without powers trains to become a hero.

animeList.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
animeList.description: A boy swallows a cursed object to fight evil spirits.

animeList.title: Naruto Shippuden
animeList.description: Naruto returns to save his friend Sasuke and protect the village from powerful enemies.

animeList.title: Death Note
animeList.description: A genius student gains the power to kill anyone by writing their name in a supernatural notebook.

animeList.title: Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood
animeList.description: Two brothers use alchemy to search for the Philosopher's Stone to restore their bodies.
